summary: Iteration 29 - Frontend testing of signature canvas in stamp page and My Stamps preview uniformity. ALL FEATURES VERIFIED WORKING: (1) My Stamps page loads with Rectangle/Circle/Oval stamps, (2) Circle/Oval stamp editors show new design matching DocumentStampPage (no logo, bigger QR), (3) NO signature section in My Stamps editor (correctly removed), (4) Document Stamp page has inline signature options (Draw/Upload/Delete), (5) Signature canvas appears when clicking 'Draw Signature', (6) Signature 'Sign Here' preview shows below stamp when Certification type selected.

my_stamps_page: My Stamps page loads without errors - PASS
Shows 3 stamp cards: Rectangle, Circle, Oval - PASS
Progress bar shows '3 of 3 stamps created' - PASS
Each stamp card has 'Click to Use' and 'Edit' buttons - PASS
circle_stamp_editor: Circle Stamp Settings header present - PASS
Live Preview shows circle stamp with new design - PASS
TLS VERIFIED text at top of stamp - PASS
Bigger QR code in center (no logo) - PASS
NO Signature section present (correctly removed) - PASS
Settings include: Stamp Name, Brand Color, Address, Show My Name - PASS
oval_stamp_editor: Oval Stamp Settings header present - PASS
Live Preview shows oval stamp with horizontal layout - PASS
TLS VERIFIED, QR code, stamp ID visible - PASS
NO Signature section present (correctly removed) - PASS
document_stamp_page_signature: Stamp Options section with Stamp Type visible - PASS
Notarization option shows 'No signature required' - PASS
Signature Option section appears when Certification selected - PASS
Use Digital Signature option with signature preview - PASS
Sign After Printing option with placeholder text - PASS
Delete signature (trash icon) button works - PASS
No Signature Saved warning appears after delete - PASS
Draw Signature button appears when no signature saved - PASS
Upload Image button appears when no signature saved - PASS
signature_canvas: Clicking Draw Signature opens signature canvas - PASS
White canvas area is visible for drawing - PASS
Clear button (↻) present and clickable - PASS
Save button present (disabled until signature drawn) - PASS
Close (X) button to cancel signature drawer - PASS
Canvas allows mouse drawing interaction - PASS
signature_preview_below_stamp: Document upload works (PDF loaded toast) - PASS
Circle stamp appears on document preview - PASS
Stamp has new design: TLS VERIFIED, QR code, stamp ID - PASS
'Sign Here' dashed box appears BELOW stamp when Certification selected - PASS
Page selection options (First Page, Last Page, All Pages) visible - PASS
Drag to reposition instruction visible - PASS

my_stamps_preview_uniformity.description: Circle/Oval stamps in My Stamps editor now match DocumentStampPage preview format - no logo, bigger QR code centered
my_stamps_preview_uniformity.circle_design: Circular border, '★ TLS VERIFIED ★' at top, large QR center, stamp ID, 'SCAN TO VERIFY' at bottom
my_stamps_preview_uniformity.oval_design: Oval border, '★ TLS VERIFIED ★' at top, horizontal layout with QR left and text right

signature_removed_from_my_stamps.description: Signature section has been removed from My Stamps editor (both Circle and Oval editors)

signature_in_document_stamp_page.description: Document Stamp page has inline signature options with full Draw/Upload/Delete capabilities

signature_canvas_draw.description: Signature drawing canvas appears when clicking 'Draw Signature' in Document Stamp page

signature_preview_below_stamp.description: When Certification stamp type is selected, 'Sign Here' dashed box appears BELOW the stamp in document preview
signature_preview_below_stamp.behavior: Signature area (30px height) is added below stamp in Rnd container

context_for_next_testing_agent: All signature-related features working correctly. Signature section removed from My Stamps editors. Document Stamp page has full signature management: Draw/Upload/Delete. Circle/Oval stamp previews in My Stamps now match DocumentStampPage format (no logo, bigger QR). Sign Here preview appears below stamp when Certification type is selected.
